heading: Access to telehealth services
label: 2069 Access to telehealth services
notes: Codification, which directed the addition of this section at the end of subtitle VII of this chapter, was executed by adding this section at the end of subchapter VII of this chapter, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Section 404(a) of Pub. L. 118–210

children.text: case managers of the Department of programs for homeless veterans authorized under this chapter; and
community-based service providers for homeless veterans receiving funds from the Department through grants or contracts.
